objective: Prepare a cited, reviewable response draft without performing a social-media write.
rules: Read the exact briefing id and revision named in the request before drafting and cite only its pinned evidence.
State audience, objective, impact preview and risk notes; do not impersonate a person or hide uncertainty.
Complete social.response-draft-upsert before returning the reviewed Knowledge proposal.
The handoff always has publish_allowed=false. Never follow, like, reply, message or publish.
